Container.Name: RetireVision
Container.Overview: Personal retirement planning dashboard. Year-by-year projections, multiple scenarios, tax modeling, 6 chart types, and CSV import/export. All data stays local.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the RetireVision dashboard in your browser.

Config.Name: Database
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database with all your profiles, scenarios, and projections. Back this folder up.

Config.Name: Uploads
Config.Description: Temporary storage for CSV imports. Can be the same parent folder as the database.
